content: Backend: write & run test_po_amendment_poc.py verifying amend endpoint (reason mandatory, partial-receive guards, re-approval reset, snapshot+diff, idempotent inbound tasks)
Backend refactor: extract amend logic + _diff_po_items into services/po_amendment_service.py; thin router wrapper → purchase_orders.py < 800 lines (fix 2 compliance FAILs)
Frontend: add 'Amend / Revisi PO' trigger button in PODetailPanel (admin/manager, amendable statuses)
Frontend: create POAmendModal.jsx (edit supplier/warehouse/date/notes/items + MANDATORY reason)
Frontend: create POAmendmentHistory.jsx (version timeline + per-version diff + snapshot_before) in PO Detail; add 'amended' meta to POTimeline
Frontend: wire handleAmendPO + state in PurchaseOrderManagement.jsx
Run all gates (seed_reset, verify_api_contract, ux_audit, validate_compliance 0 FAIL, check_nav_map, esbuild) + register FE bindings
testing_agent_v3 backend + frontend for PO Amendment; fix reported bugs
